headline: Jim Cramer Left Stumped by ConocoPhillips (COP)
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer Commented On Big Market Confusion & Discussed These 20 Stocks. ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is an oil and gas exploration and production company. Its shares are up by 34.8% over the past year and by 27% year-to-date. Jefferies discussed the firm […]

headline: Despite Soaring 46%, ConocoPhillips Is a Hold as Price Target Trails
summary: Our ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) call comes on the heels of a mixed Q1 2026 earnings report, where adjusted earnings beat but revenue missed amid softer realized prices. headline: S&P 500 Faces Oil-Fueled Sell-off Pressure in Possible Return to Merger Monday Deal
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) opened the week lower as oil prices spiked on renewed Iran tensions, with index futures slipping 0.1% after conflicting reports about a U.S. warship near the Strait of Hormuz. WTI crude futures jumped 3% to trade above $105 per barrel, and Brent climbed 3% to above $111, pulling capital into energy names. Futures recovered once ... S&P 500 Faces Oil-Fueled Sell-off Pressure in Possible Return to Merger Monday Deal
